content.full_text:
Association Headquarters
of California
1100 N Street, Suite 5
Sacramento, California 95814
(916) 443-1611
FAX (916) 443-1663

— Professional Association Management —

April 4, 1991


Mark Morodomi
Attorney at Law
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Mr. Morodomi,

This confirms our several telephone conversations wherein it was
resolved that the California School Nurses Organization Political
Action Committee (CSNO PAC) may expend PAC funds to pay for a
breakfast to be held in the Capitol Basement Cafeteria and to
transport individuals to that, and other events. It was also
resolved that all people shall sign in regardless of the fact that
the expenditure limit shall not exceed $10 per month per
legislator and/or staff.

Thank you for your clarification on this issue. I would
appreciate you filing this for the record.

Very truly yours,

SKIP DAUM
President

Legislative Advocate for the
California School Nurses
Organization


cc:    Barbara Bradstock, CSNO President
       Ann Yule, CSNO PAC Chairman
       Mary Avery, CSNO PAC Treasurer


SD/kcd

2/morodomi.ah

Member:

☐ Meeting               ☐ Sacramento      ☐ Institute          ☐ Institute of
  Planners               Society of         Association           Governmental
  International          Association        Management            Advocates
                         Executives         Companies
